item.title: Terabox [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Terabox [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: haylemcandelario
item.itunes:summary:
Terabox
(Internet Apps)
TeraBox es una aplicación innovadora de almacenamiento en la nube que protege todos los archivos de tu dispositivo, los organiza por ti, y te ayuda a crear una copia de respaldo de manera rápida y buscar entre tus fotos usando una tecnología de inteligencia artificial .

[read more]
item.description:
Terabox
(Internet Apps)
TeraBox es una aplicación innovadora de almacenamiento en la nube que protege todos los archivos de tu dispositivo, los organiza por ti, y te ayuda a crear una copia de respaldo de manera rápida y buscar entre tus fotos usando una tecnología de inteligencia artificial .

[read more]

Terabox
(Internet Apps)
TeraBox es una aplicación innovadora de almacenamiento en la nube que protege todos los archivos de tu dispositivo, los organiza por ti, y te ayuda a crear una copia de respaldo de manera rápida y buscar entre tus fotos usando una tecnología de inteligencia artificial .

[read more]

item.title: ArcGis for GNU/Linux [Science]
item.itunes:title: ArcGis for GNU/Linux [Science]
item.itunes:author: haylemcandelario
item.itunes:summary:
ArcGis for GNU/Linux
(Science)
ArcGIS es una familia de software de sistema de información geográfica (SIG) cliente desarrollado y mantenido por Esri . ArcGIS se lanzó por primera vez en 1982 como ARC/INFO

[read more]

(Science)

[read more]

ArcGis for GNU/Linux

item.title: Blender Appimages [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Blender Appimages [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: frutinha
item.itunes:summary:
Blender Appimages
(3D Graphics)
Here, i upload some appimages build by me, using original binaries from blender.org. I don't change any binaries it self, just put inside a appimage container.
Ii will be adding new versions when blender foundation release then, and also, i will be uploading older versions of it by the time.
[read more]
item.description:
Blender Appimages

Here, i upload some appimages build by me, using original binaries from blender.org. I don't change any binaries it self, just put inside a appimage container.
Ii will be adding new versions when blender foundation release then, and also, i will be uploading older versions of it by the time.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Blender Appimages
(3D Graphics)
Here, i upload some appimages build by me, using original binaries from blender.org. I don't change any binaries it self, just put inside a appimage container.
Ii will be adding new versions when blender foundation release then, and also, i will be uploading older versions of it by the time.
[read more]

item.title: Kardus Debian Maker [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Kardus Debian Maker [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Kardus Debian Maker
(Utilities)
Easy to make debian (deb) file with this app
Important : when you want create folder for your project make sure you dont use spacebar or any symbols (the app can not read the link with space) = just one word
example =
Correct : /home/user/document/myapp
Wrong : /home/user/my project/myapp OR /home/user/document/my app = when use "spacebar"

tutorial :
https://youtu.be/4TFRm1yW5EE
[read more]
item.description:
Kardus Debian Maker
(Utilities)
Easy to make debian (deb) file with this app
Important : when you want create folder for your project make sure you dont use spacebar or any symbols (the app can not read the link with space) = just one word
example =
Correct : /home/user/document/myapp
Wrong : /home/user/my project/myapp OR /home/user/document/my app = when use "spacebar"

tutorial :
https://youtu.be/4TFRm1yW5EE
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Kardus Debian Maker
(Utilities)
Easy to make debian (deb) file with this app
Important : when you want create folder for your project make sure you dont use spacebar or any symbols (the app can not read the link with space) = just one word
example =
Correct : /home/user/document/myapp
Wrong : /home/user/my project/myapp OR /home/user/document/my app = when use "spacebar"

tutorial :
https://youtu.be/4TFRm1yW5EE

item.title: RecordMydesktop GUI [Screen Recorders]
item.itunes:title: RecordMydesktop GUI [Screen Recorders]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
RecordMydesktop GUI
(Screen Recorders)
A graphical frontend for recordmydesktop.
Works with most X11 desktop environments.
Does not work with Wayland.

[read more]

(Screen Recorders)

Does not work with Wayland.

item.title: Creador de musica libre y profesional con IA [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Creador de musica libre y profesional con IA [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: haylemcandelario
item.itunes:summary:
Creador de musica libre y profesional con IA
(Music Production)
Una herramienta para producir música profesionalmente, online y a la vez plataforma de contenido de audio online. Libre de derechos de autor.

[read more]
item.description:

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Creador de musica libre y profesional con IA
(Music Production)
Una herramienta para producir música profesionalmente, online y a la vez plataforma de contenido de audio online. Libre de derechos de autor.

[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: Drawish [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Drawish [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: nikknizz
item.itunes:summary:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.3: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]
item.description:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.3: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.3: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]

item.title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:author: speed-dreams
item.itunes:summary:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
https://www.speed-dreams.net/
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base.
[read more]
item.description:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
https://www.speed-dreams.net/
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
https://www.speed-dreams.net/
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base.
[read more]
